title: ortholoma clarum
intro: Ortholoma clarum, also known as the Clear-eyed Ortholoma, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Ortholoma clarum include its ability to promote healing, reduce inflammation, and improve overall skin health. Herbal preparations of Ortholoma clarum can be made into teas, tinctures, or topical creams, and are often used to treat minor skin irritations, such as acne, burns, and cuts.
